# CLAUDE.md

## StoryRail Workflow

This repository is onboarded to StoryRail.

Before implementation, read:
- specs/<feature>/story.md
- specs/<feature>/functional-spec.md
- specs/<feature>/technical-design.md
- specs/<feature>/test-plan.md
- specs/<feature>/tasks.yaml

Follow the task graph exactly. If a requested change falls outside the active task graph, stop and ask for a StoryRail update instead of editing unrelated files.
